headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Launches Texas Advisory Board Led By Ed Knight
summary: Nasdaq Texas has launched its first Advisory Board, chaired by Ed Knight. The board brings together leaders from law, energy, finance, and the nonprofit sector. The group is intended to guide Nasdaq’s regional strategy and growth plans in Texas. NasdaqGS:NDAQ runs global exchanges, market technology, and related services, and Nasdaq Texas reflects the company’s efforts to deepen its role in key regional hubs. By forming an Advisory Board with cross sector expertise, Nasdaq is aligning its...
